title: The Sunk Cost Trap Secretly Costing You $4,700
hook: You keep paying for things you never use because you already spent money on them — and that mental glitch is draining thousands a year.
angle: The sunk cost fallacy isn't just for failed startups — it bleeds everyday people through gyms, dead subscriptions, and held losing stocks, totaling $4,700/year
audience: Anyone who keeps paying for things they hate but can't bring themselves to cancel
key_numbers: 67% of gym members don't exercise regularly
Investors hold losing stocks 60% longer than winners
